---
title: "Home"
format: html
---

# Hi — I'm a Data Science Student

Welcome to my portfolio. Below are featured projects and an interactive data science app.

## Featured Project

- Project: Music mood classification from short audio samples using machine learning models.

## Interactive Demo

Run my Shiny app locally and open:

- http://127.0.0.1:8000 (Shiny app)

The deployed Posit Cloud app is embedded on the project page.
